title: Stuart Reardon
description: GB & England international rugby league footballer
extract: Stuart Reardon (born 13 October 1981) is an English former professional rugby league footballer who played as a fullback, wing, or centre. An England and Great Britain international, he played for Bradford Bulls, Warrington Wolves and North Wales Crusaders, and also had loan spells with Featherstone Rovers and Salford City Reds during his early career.
